content.en:
Airplanes!!!!

The rules of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao were superimposed in the form of Luoxia's light, gradually forming a special light.

In an instant, countless Luoxia lights merged into Ye Tian's body.

At this time, he took out a mythical spiritual object and used Luo Xia's light to refine it, so as to carry out the eternal Dao.

Click!

The shackles in the darkness were shattered by the light of Luoxia.

His Eternal Dao Transformation proceeded quickly, and he easily completed the Eternal Dao Transformation to the seventy percent realm.

Sixty percent of nine eternal supreme dao and seventy percent eternal supreme dao seem to be only a little different, but there is a big gap.

Now.

Ye Tian's body seemed to be getting stronger and stronger, as if it had ushered in a transformation, and the eighteen supreme mythical bodies gradually fused fifty percent, this was a real transformation.

Soon, Ye Tian was completely stabilized at the level of Seventy Percent Eternal Daoization.

"Strength, it's skyrocketing!"

Ye Tian was excited.

This time, obtaining the light of Luoxia, the eternal and Taoist secret art, is simply a big profit!

"The strength has skyrocketed, and my several replica bodies have joined forces, and I am afraid that they are not weaker than the strongest mythical spirit in the Mythical Valley. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Valley of Myths.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was changed again, and they all became seventy percent eternal to the realm of Taoism.

Immediately afterward, he challenged the mythical spirit again.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian urged one innate primordial treasure after another, and fought against this mythical spirit.

This time, Ye Tian was not injured, but kept fighting with him, and he was not weak in the slightest.

"Sure enough, after my strength skyrocketed, I joined forces, and with the help of these innate primordial treasures, my combat power was enough to match the other party!" Ye Tian thought excitedly.

However, it is only a match, and it is impossible to kill the opponent.

"Hahaha, I now have the secret technique of Eternal Dao Transformation of Luo Xia's Light, and I still have a lot of mythical spiritual objects, which can definitely be easily elevated to the Eternal Dao Transformation. Even after the seventy percent eternal enlightenment, it is more difficult to improve, but it will certainly not be too slow. Once I reach the Ten Percent Eternal Dao Realm, I will have the hope of impacting the Eternal Dao Realm. Ye Tian thought.

But.

He still had to stay in Luoxia Pavilion for 100 million Eternal Dao Era years, and unless Luoxia Pavilion took the initiative to break the contract oath with him, he would be able to leave early.

"I still have to help Luo Xia Pavilion resolve the crisis!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Presently.

There is only one real crisis in Luoxia Pavilion - the Crazy River Chamber of Commerce, this force has a hostile relationship with Luoxia Pavilion, suppressing Luoxia Pavilion's business everywhere, and assassinating the strong people of Luoxia Pavilion.

Now.

The myths in Luoxia Pavilion are almost all bound by oaths and cannot leave, otherwise they would have run away a long time ago.

And the Crazy River Chamber of Commerce is very powerful, with one Eternal Dao Realm, six Eternal Dao Realm powerhouses, more than sixty Eternal Dao Late Dao Realm powerhouses, and even more Myth Dao Realm below.

Compared to today's Crazy River Chamber of Commerce, Luoxia Pavilion is an ant.

But the headquarters of Luoxia Pavilion is located in Luoshen City, and the original pavilion master of Luoxia Pavilion is the city lord of Luoshen City, and now although the city lord of Luoshen City is someone else, he also gives Luoxia Pavilion a little care, so as not to let the strong man of the Wind Chamber of Commerce wipe it out in the city.

Therefore, Luo Xia Pavilion will survive for a long time.

In addition to the Tempest Chamber of Commerce, there are many forces that are eager to obtain the Luoxia Light of Luoxia Pavilion and some resources, but these forces are not strong and should not be feared.

The six Eternal Dao Realm powerhouses of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce, Ye Tian didn't take them in his eyes now, what he was afraid of was that Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse, and he didn't know anything about the strength of the other party.

However, there is a high probability that he will not be an opponent, unless he continues to ascend to the Eternal Dao.

"Don't care about it so much for now, let's use Luoxia's light to enhance eternity to Daohua first!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Time flies.

Another million years have passed.

With the assistance of the mythical spiritual objects and the light of Luoxia, Ye Tian's progress was too fast, and now he had reached the realm of Eternal Dao Eighty.

The reason why he has improved so quickly is mainly because the effect of his Luoxia Light is too good, far surpassing the Luoxia Light of others.

After all, his Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules have reached the Ten Percent Perfection Realm, and Luo Xia's Light is the application of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules are strong, and Luo Xia's Light is naturally extremely powerful.

During this period of time, Ye Tian didn't have anything to do in Luoxia Pavilion, only occasionally maintaining the order of Luoxia Pavilion in Luoshen City.

At present, Luo Xia Pavilion's business is only Luo Shen City.

this day.

Luo Wushuang, the pavilion master of Luoxia Pavilion, came to find Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, you have joined Luoxia Pavilion for a million years, and there has been no task entrusted to you before, but now there is an important task entrusted to you, you need to go to Xuanlin Valley to guard for a period of time. Luo Wushuang said.

"Xuanlin Valley!"

Ye Tian knew what kind of place this was.

He had purchased a map of the ancient kingdom, which recorded a large number of treasures, including the Xuanlin Valley.

The Xuanlin Valley has a vein of the Xuanwu Stone, which can be used to refine the Xuanwu Gold, which is the material used to make the Ancient Coins.

Xuanwu Gold can not only be used to make ancient coins, but also can be used to refine Eternal Dao Divine Weapons, but Xuanwu Gold is only one of the materials.

If you really want to refine an Eternal Dao Divine Weapon, the materials consumed are unimaginable.

And Luo Xia Pavilion used to have an Eternal Dao Divine Weapon, but with the fall of that Eternal Dao Realm, that Eternal Dao Divine Weapon was naturally lost, otherwise the Eternal Dao Realm would have come to snatch it.

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tiandao.

Luo Wushuang was a little surprised, she thought that Ye Tian was going to refuse.

Immediately.

Ye Tian took Luo Wushuang's warrant and went to Xuanlin Valley.

And after Ye Tian left, an old man appeared beside Luo Wushuang.

"Grandfather!"

Luo Wushuang shouted respectfully.

The old man is Luo Wushuang's maternal grandfather, the only powerhouse of the late stage of Eternal Daoism in Luo Xia Pavilion-Xinghai!

"Ahem, ahem, ahem!!"

Xinghai coughed lightly.

For a powerhouse in the late stage of Eternal Daohua, it is impossible to cough, which is the embodiment of the difficulty of suppressing the injury.

Seeing this, Luo Wushuang said worriedly: "Grandfather, are you okay?"

"It's okay!" Xinghai shook his head, "I know the extent of my injuries, although they can't be cured, they won't kill me." However, do you really rest assured that an Eternal Daoist powerhouse who has only joined Luoxia Pavilion not long ago will go to guard Xuanlin Valley? That is the last property of our Xuanlin Pavilion. "
